pi_items.source: Web search for Svalbard Satellite Station coordinates, identifying Platåberget location.
Web search for Svalbard Satellite Station coordinates, identifying Platåberget location.
Web search for Svalbard Satellite Station altitude, indicating 400-500 meters.
Web search for NORAD catalog IDs mapping to ISS, CSS, SUOMI, FENGYUN, and DMSP 5D-3 satellites, and confirmation within the provided weather.txt and stations.txt TLE files.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real-world geographical coordinates for the Svalbard Satellite Station (SvalSat) located at approximately 78.2298 N, 15.4078 E, and 450m altitude. The satellite NORAD IDs correctly correspond to actual tracking data for the requested satellites (ISS ZARYA: 25544, CSS TIANHE: 48274, CSS WENTIAN: 53239, SUOMI NPP: 37849, FENGYUN 3A: 32958, FENGYUN 3B: 37214, DMSP 5D-3 F18: 35951) which are present in the provided real-world TLE data files.
